Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
The patient shows significant renal impairment (markedly elevated creatinine, proteinuria, microalbuminuria), hypoglycemia with low HbA1c, and abnormal urine findings (cloudy, brown, low specific gravity, bilirubin, ketones, protein). Lipid profile shows low cholesterol. Findings suggest possible advanced chronic kidney disease with nephrotic-range proteinuria and metabolic disturbances. Immediate nephrology evaluation is recommended.
